{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Accounting Officer",
  "description": "VFB Hotels is a premier hospitality destination located in the heart of Sapele, Delta State. Established with a commitment to excellence, we provide a sophisticated sanctuary for business executives, travelers, and local guests who value comfort, security, and world-class service. Our facility is designed to blend modern luxury with the warm, authentic hospitality that Nigeria is known for.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accounting Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Sapele, Delta
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Hospitality / Hotel Management

Description


	Are you a detail-oriented finance professional looking to grow your career in a fast-paced hospitality environment?
	Our hotel is looking for a dedicated Accounting Officer to manage our daily financial operations and ensure fiscal accuracy.


Key Responsibilities


	Financial Reporting: Prepare daily, weekly, and monthly financial reports, including profit and loss statements.
	Revenue Management: Reconcile daily front-desk sales, bar/restaurant receipts, and room occupancy reports.
	Bookkeeping: Maintain accurate records of all accounts payable and receivable.
	Audit &amp; Compliance: Conduct periodic internal audits of inventory and petty cash.
	Payroll: Assist in the processing of staff salaries and statutory remittances (tax, pension, etc.).


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Education: OND, HND, or B.Sc. in Accounting, Banking &amp; Finance, or a related discipline.
	Experience: Previous experience in a hotel or hospitality setting is a significant advantage.
	Technical Skills: Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and familiarity with accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks, Sage, or Hotel Management Systems).
	Attributes: High level of integrity, strong analytical skills, and the ability to work with minimal supervision.
	Location: Candidates must reside in Sapele or be willing to relocate.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV and a brief Cover Letter via email to:&nbsp;john.olley@aetlnigeria.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Accounting Officer Job at VFB Hotels




        
    

        
        VFB Hotels is a premier hospitality destination located in the heart of Sapele, Delta State. Established with a commitment to excellence, we provide a sophisticated sanctuary for business executives, travelers, and local guests who value comfort, security, and world-class service. Our facility is designed to blend modern luxury with the warm, authentic hospitality that Nigeria is known for.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accounting Officer

Job Location: Sapele, Delta
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Hospitality / Hotel Management

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Are you a detail-oriented finance professional looking to grow your career in a fast-paced hospitality environment?
	Our hotel is looking for a dedicated Accounting Officer to manage our daily financial operations and ensure fiscal accuracy.


Key Responsibilities


	Financial Reporting: Prepare daily, weekly, and monthly financial reports, including profit and loss statements.
	Revenue Management: Reconcile daily front-desk sales, bar/restaurant receipts, and room occupancy reports.
	Bookkeeping: Maintain accurate records of all accounts payable and receivable.
	Audit & Compliance: Conduct periodic internal audits of inventory and petty cash.
	Payroll: Assist in the processing of staff salaries and statutory remittances (tax, pension, etc.).


Requirements & Qualifications


	Education: OND, HND, or B.Sc. in Accounting, Banking & Finance, or a related discipline.
	Experience: Previous experience in a hotel or hospitality setting is a significant advantage.
	Technical Skills: Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and familiarity with accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks, Sage, or Hotel Management Systems).
	Attributes: High level of integrity, strong analytical skills, and the ability to work with minimal supervision.
	Location: Candidates must reside in Sapele or be willing to relocate.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV and a brief Cover Letter via email to: john.olley@aetlnigeria.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Front Desk / Guest Services Officer",
  "description": "CVM Careers, a&nbsp;recruitment Company,&nbsp;is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Front Desk / Guest Services Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Sangotedo, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Mode:&nbsp;24-Hour Shift Rotation
Work Schedule: 1 Day On / 1 Day Off (Shift runs 8:00am &ndash; 8:00am the following day)

Core Responsibilities
Guest Services &amp; Relations:


	Check-In &amp; Check-Out:&nbsp;Efficiently manage guest arrivals and departures, ensuring accurate documentation, proper key issuance, and a seamless guest experience.
	Guest Inquiries:&nbsp;Serve as the primary point of contact for all guest questions, including room amenities (fridge, electric burner cooker, Wi-Fi access, etc.).
	Issue Resolution:&nbsp;Promptly address guest complaints, maintenance concerns, or service requests to maintain high satisfaction levels.


Administrative &amp; Front Office Operations:


	Reservations Management:&nbsp;Handle bookings across multiple platforms, ensuring accurate room availability and preventing double bookings.
	Payment Processing:&nbsp;Process guest billing and payments accurately, maintaining financial integrity at all times.
	Record Keeping:&nbsp;Maintain organized guest records and ensure the front desk area remains clean, structured, and professional.


Coordination &amp; Safety:


	Housekeeping Liaison:&nbsp;Communicate effectively with Housekeeping to ensure rooms are cleaned, inspected, and ready before guest arrival.
	Security Monitoring:&nbsp;Actively monitor 24/7 CCTV feeds and maintain vigilance to ensure the safety of guests, staff, and property.
	Facilities Oversight:&nbsp;Promptly notify management of issues related to utilities, including backup generator performance or other essential services.


Requirements &amp; Skills


	Experience:&nbsp;Prior experience in a hotel, serviced apartment, or hospitality environment is strongly preferred.
	Communication:&nbsp;Strong verbal and written communication skills with excellent customer service etiquette.
	Technical Skills:&nbsp;Comfortable using property management systems, WhatsApp for guest communication, and basic office tools.
	Attention to Detail:&nbsp;High level of accuracy in data entry, documentation, and financial transactions.
	Flexibility:&nbsp;Ability to work rotating shifts, including weekends and public holidays, in support of 24-hour operations.


Key Competencies:


	Professional, welcoming personality
	Strong multitasking and organizational skills
	Proactive problem-solving ability
	Calm under pressure
	High level of personal responsibility and integrity.


Salary
N120,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should their CV to:&nbsp;cvmakeover.cv@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-03-12",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "CVM Career Company"
    
  },

Front Desk / Guest Services Officer Job at CVM Career Company




        
    

        
        CVM Careers, a recruitment Company, is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk / Guest Services Officer

Job Location: Sangotedo, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Mode: 24-Hour Shift Rotation
Work Schedule: 1 Day On / 1 Day Off (Shift runs 8:00am – 8:00am the following day)

Core Responsibilities
Guest Services & Relations:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Check-In & Check-Out: Efficiently manage guest arrivals and departures, ensuring accurate documentation, proper key issuance, and a seamless guest experience.
	Guest Inquiries: Serve as the primary point of contact for all guest questions, including room amenities (fridge, electric burner cooker, Wi-Fi access, etc.).
	Issue Resolution: Promptly address guest complaints, maintenance concerns, or service requests to maintain high satisfaction levels.


Administrative & Front Office Operations:


	Reservations Management: Handle bookings across multiple platforms, ensuring accurate room availability and preventing double bookings.
	Payment Processing: Process guest billing and payments accurately, maintaining financial integrity at all times.
	Record Keeping: Maintain organized guest records and ensure the front desk area remains clean, structured, and professional.


Coordination & Safety:


	Housekeeping Liaison: Communicate effectively with Housekeeping to ensure rooms are cleaned, inspected, and ready before guest arrival.
	Security Monitoring: Actively monitor 24/7 CCTV feeds and maintain vigilance to ensure the safety of guests, staff, and property.
	Facilities Oversight: Promptly notify management of issues related to utilities, including backup generator performance or other essential services.


Requirements & Skills


	Experience: Prior experience in a hotel, serviced apartment, or hospitality environment is strongly preferred.
	Communication: Strong verbal and written communication skills with excellent customer service etiquette.
	Technical Skills: Comfortable using property management systems, WhatsApp for guest communication, and basic office tools.
	Attention to Detail: High level of accuracy in data entry, documentation, and financial transactions.
	Flexibility: Ability to work rotating shifts, including weekends and public holidays, in support of 24-hour operations.


Key Competencies:


	Professional, welcoming personality
	Strong multitasking and organizational skills
	Proactive problem-solving ability
	Calm under pressure
	High level of personal responsibility and integrity.


Salary
N120,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should their CV to: cvmakeover.cv@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",

  "description": "Verstand Resources - Our client, a renowned food vendor, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Customer Service Representative Job at Verstand Resources Limited




        
    

        
        Verstand Resources - Our client, a renowned food vendor, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Representative 
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a friendly and customer-focused Customer Service Representative to join their team. As a Customer Service Rep, you will interact with customers, ensuring they have a positive experience.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Handle customer inquiries via phone, WhatsApp, email, or in-person.
	Assist customers with placing, tracking, or modifying food orders.
	Resolve customer complaints swiftly and professionally.
	Promote products by suggesting popular food items.
	Maintain records of customer interactions and feedback in the CRM.
	Collaborate with kitchen and delivery teams for smooth operations.
	Provide feedback to help improve services.


Requirements


	Minimum HND/BSc in related fields (Customer Service, Hospitality, etc.)
	At least 1 year of customer service experience.
	Experience using CRM systems.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Customer-centric mindset.
	Problem-solving abilities.
	Basic tech skills (handling POS, WhatsApp Business, etc.).


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hr@verstandresources.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Female Content Creator (AI + Video)",
  "description": "Vitalvida Limited -&nbsp;We provide you with an excellent eCommerce experience as our clients satisfaction matters a lot to us. We have an amazing combination of Products on our various websites that are tailored to meet your needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Female Content Creator (AI + Video)&nbsp;

Job Location:&nbsp;Yaba (Oyingbo), Lagos

Description


	A fast-growing e-commerce brand is looking for a creative female content creator to make engaging videos and ads for our social media.
	In this job, you will create videos using your phone and AI tools, and turn ideas into content that attracts attention and promotes our products.


What You Will Do


	Record clear, high-quality videos using a phone
	Edit videos using CapCut or similar editing software
	Create short videos for Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube
	Use AI tools like Sora, Midjourney, and FLUX to create images and videos
	Turn AI content into powerful ads that grab attention and sell our products
	Create new video ideas
	Follow social media trends and create fresh content
	Deliver videos on time and keep video files well organized.


Requirements


	Experience creating and editing videos
	Good knowledge of CapCut or similar editing tools
	Ability to shoot and edit videos using a phone or laptop
	Understanding of Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube content
	Ability to add funny clips and moments in videos to make them exciting and keep viewers watching
	Creative mindset with attention to detail
	Good communication skills
	Ability to meet deadlines and stay organized.
",

Female Content Creator (AI + Video) Job at Vitalvida Limited




        
    

        
        Vitalvida Limited - We provide you with an excellent eCommerce experience as our clients satisfaction matters a lot to us. We have an amazing combination of Products on our various websites that are tailored to meet your needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Female Content Creator (AI + Video) 

Job Location: Yaba (Oyingbo), Lagos

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	A fast-growing e-commerce brand is looking for a creative female content creator to make engaging videos and ads for our social media.
	In this job, you will create videos using your phone and AI tools, and turn ideas into content that attracts attention and promotes our products.


What You Will Do


	Record clear, high-quality videos using a phone
	Edit videos using CapCut or similar editing software
	Create short videos for Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube
	Use AI tools like Sora, Midjourney, and FLUX to create images and videos
	Turn AI content into powerful ads that grab attention and sell our products
	Create new video ideas
	Follow social media trends and create fresh content
	Deliver videos on time and keep video files well organized.


Requirements


	Experience creating and editing videos
	Good knowledge of CapCut or similar editing tools
	Ability to shoot and edit videos using a phone or laptop
	Understanding of Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube content
	Ability to add funny clips and moments in videos to make them exciting and keep viewers watching
	Creative mindset with attention to detail
	Good communication skills
	Ability to meet deadlines and stay organized.
    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
